nasb.text: It came about at the end of forty days and nights that the Lord gave me the two tablets of stone, the tablets of the covenant.

esv.text: And at the end of forty days and forty nights the Lord gave me the two tablets of stone, the tablets of the covenant.

cnv.text: 過了四十晝夜，耶和華把那兩塊石版，就是約版，交給了我。

ccb.text: 四十昼夜后，耶和华把那两块刻着约的石版交给我，
